response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video for musical performances and on-screen text. 2. Identified two distinct song segments. 3. For the first song, attempted to find lyrics using the phrases "愛たいと言いたくて", "輝いた季節は", and "かなわない夢なんて" but no direct matches were found. 4. For the second song, identified the title "運命の一撃" from the on-screen text. 5. Performed searches for both songs to attempt to find lyrics, but neither resulted in full lyrics to provide, therefore they are set to null. 6. Constructed the final JSON output.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Usada Pekora during her 3rd Anniversary Live. The video includes an initial song performance, followed by a talking segment, and concludes with a short Pachinko-themed jingle song titled '運命の一撃'.

scenes.description: Usada Pekora performs a song on stage during her 3rd Anniversary Live.
Usada Pekora performs a short, high-energy song segment titled '運命の一撃' (Unmei no Ichigeki) with pachinko/slot machine visuals.
